CHENIRONCLAD-USE_CHEN_CARD_FRAME.title: Enable card frame
CHENIRONCLAD-USE_CHEN_CARD_FRAME.hover.d: Enable card frame recolor for Chen(Ironclad)
CHENIRONCLAD-USE_CHEN_ENERGY.title: Enable energy counter
CHENIRONCLAD-USE_CHEN_ENERGY.hover.desc: Enable energy counter recolor for Chen(Ironclad)
CHENIRONCLAD-USE_CHEN_MULT_ARM.title: Enable mutliplayer arm
CHENIRONCLAD-USE_CHEN_MULT_ARM.hover.des: Enable custom multiplayer arm (rock/paper/scissor/point) for Chen(Ironclad)
CHENIRONCLAD-USE_CHIXIAO_HELLRAISER.hove: Replace sword animation of Hellraiser with Chi Xiao
CHENIRONCLAD-DEBUG_MODE.title: Enable debug mode
CHENIRONCLAD-DEBUG_MODE.hover.desc: Enable debug mode that will print debug in logs, usually disable to prevent log flooding
